mapper.select: /* osstMgmtMapper.selectNonKmvRcpList */ SELECT MJ.CONTRACT_NUM, MJ.SCAN_ID, MJ.ON_OFF_TYPE, MJ.OPEN_AGNT_CD, MD.RES_NO, NVL(MD.REQ_BUY_TYPE, 'UU') AS REQ_BUY_TYPE, NVL(MD.REQ_BUY_TYPE_NM, '유심단독구매') AS REQ_BUY_TYPE_NM, MJ.MOVE_COMPANY, (SELECT DTL_CD_NM FROM NMCP_CD_DTL@DL_MCP WHERE CD_GROUP_ID = 'NSC' AND DTL_CD = MJ.MOVE_COMPANY ) AS MOVE_COMPANY_NM, MD.SALE_PLCY_CD, MD.SALE_PLCY_NM, MD.OPEN_MARKET_REFERER, MD.RECOMMEND_FLAG_CD, MD.RECOMMEND_FLAG_NM, MD.RECOMMEND_INFO, MD.REC_YN, MD.SHOP_CD, MD.SHOP_NM, MD.MINOR_AGENT_NAME, MD.MINOR_AGENT_RELATION, MD.MINOR_AGENT_REL_NM, MD.MINOR_AGENT_TEL, MD.APP_CD, MD.APP_NM, MD.JOIN_PAY_MTHD_CD, MD.JOIN_PAY_MTHD_NM, MD.JOIN_PRICE, MD.USIM_PAY_MTHD_CD, MD.USIM_PAY_MTHD_NM, MD.USIM_PRICE, MD.RENTAL_BASE_AMT, MD.RENTAL_BASE_DC_AMT, MD.RENTAL_MODEL_CP_AMT, '21' AS REQUEST_STATE_CODE, MD.SHOP_USM_ID, MD.REG_DTTM, MJ.PROD_TYPE, MD.PROD_TYPE_NM, MD.REQ_USIM_NAME, MD.FST_RATE_CD, MD.FST_RATE_NM, MD.LST_RATE_CD, MD.LST_RATE_NM, MD.FST_MODEL_INFO, MD.INST_INFO, MD.SIM_INFO, MD.OTA_DATE, MD.CATCH_CALL, MD.DVC_CHG_CNT, MD.DVC_CHG_INFO, MD.CATCH_CALL_CAN, MD.PROMOTION_CD, MD.REAL_SHOP_NM, MJ.PPPO AS SERVICE_TYPE, '00' AS PSTATE, MJ.SUB_LINK_NAME AS CSTMR_NAME, MD.FST_RATE_CD AS SOC_CODE, MJ.OPEN_AGNT_CD AS CNTPNT_SHOP_ID, MD.OPEN_AGNT_CD AS AGENT_CODE, SUBSTR(CRYPTO_AES256.DEC_AES(MJ.USER_SSN),0,6) AS CSTMR_NATIVE_RRN1, SUBSTR(CRYPTO_AES256.DEC_AES(MJ.USER_SSN),7) AS CSTMR_NATIVE_RRN2, CASE WHEN LENGTH(MJ.SUBSCRIBER_NO) = 10 OR LENGTH(MJ.SUBSCRIBER_NO) = 11 THEN SUBSTR(MJ.SUBSCRIBER_NO, 0, 3) END CSTMR_TEL_FN, CASE WHEN LENGTH(MJ.SUBSCRIBER_NO) = 10 THEN SUBSTR(MJ.SUBSCRIBER_NO, 4, 3) WHEN LENGTH(MJ.SUBSCRIBER_NO) = 11 THEN SUBSTR(MJ.SUBSCRIBER_NO, 4, 4) END CSTMR_TEL_MN, CASE WHEN LENGTH(MJ.SUBSCRIBER_NO) = 10 OR LENGTH(MJ.SUBSCRIBER_NO) = 11 THEN SUBSTR(MJ.SUBSCRIBER_NO, -4) END CSTMR_TEL_RN, MJ.ICC_ID AS REQ_USIM_SN, '12,29,30,31' AS ADDITION_KEY, '발신번호표시,스팸차단서비스,정보제공사업자번호차단,통합사서함' AS ADDITION_NAME, '0' AS ADDITION_PRICE, 'N' AS USIM_PRICE_TYPE, 'P' AS JOIN_PRICE_TYPE, (SELECT EVNT_TRTM_DT FROM MSP_JUO_SUB_INFO_HIST WHERE EVNT_CD = 'NAC' AND CONTRACT_NUM = MJ.CONTRACT_NUM AND ROWNUM =1) AS REQ_IN_DAY, (SELECT IPIN_CI FROM MSP_JUO_CUS_INFO WHERE CUSTOMER_ID = MJ.CUSTOMER_ID) AS NICE_CERT_KEY, /* CI */ DECODE(MJ.MOVE_COMPANY, '', 'NAC3', 'MNP3') as OPER_TYPE, DECODE(MJ.MOVE_COMPANY, '', '신규개통', '번호이동') as OPER_TYPE_NM, (SELECT BL_BILLING_METHOD FROM MSP_JUO_BAN_INFO WHERE BAN = MJ.BAN) AS REQ_PAY_TYPE, /* 납부방법코드(RCP0036) */ DECODE(MJ.USIM_TYPE, 'E', '09', '02') AS USIM_KINDS_CD, /* SIM구분코드(U/E) */ MD.CSTMR_TYPE, /* 고객구분 - 내국인,외국인,미성년자 */ (SELECT CASE WHEN JEHU_PROD_TYPE IS NOT NULL THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END FROM MSP_RATE_MST WHERE RATE_CD = MD.FST_RATE_CD) AS CLAUSE_JEHU_FLAG, /* 요금제애 제휴처 제공 동의 */ (SELECT JEHU_PROD_TYPE FROM MSP_RATE_MST WHERE RATE_CD = MD.FST_RATE_CD) AS JEHU_PROD_TYPE, /* 요금제애 따른 제휴처 */ NVL((SELECT 'Y' FROM NMCP_CD_DTL@DL_MCP WHERE CD_GROUP_ID = 'PartnerTerm' AND DTL_CD = MD.OPEN_AGNT_CD),'N') AS CLAUSE_PARTNER_OFFER_FLAG /* 제휴사 제공 동의 */ FROM MSP_JUO_SUB_INFO MJ, MSP_REQUEST_DTL MD WHERE 1 = 1 AND MJ.CONTRACT_NUM = MD.CONTRACT_NUM AND MJ.LST_COM_ACTV_DATE >= TO_CHAR(SYSDATE-7, 'YYYYMMDD') AND MJ.OPEN_AGNT_CD = 'V000019621' AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM MDS_OSST_ORDER WHERE REQ_TEL_NO = MJ.SUBSCRIBER_NO AND SUBSTR(TR_TIME, 1, 8) >= TO_CHAR(SYSDATE-7, 'YYYYMMDD')) AND MD.REQUEST_KEY IS NULL
/* osstMgmtMapper.maxRequestkey */ SELECT SQ_RCP_REQUEST_KEY_01.NEXTVAL@dl_mcp AS requestkey, SQ_RCP_RES_NO_01.NEXTVAL@dl_mcp AS resNo FROM DUAL
mapper.insert: /* osstMgmtMapper.insertRcpRequest */ INSERT INTO MCP_REQUEST@DL_MCP ( REQUEST_KEY, MANAGER_CODE, AGENT_CODE, SERVICE_TYPE, OPER_TYPE, CSTMR_TYPE, RES_CODE, RES_MSG, RES_NO, CLAUSE_PRI_COLLECT_FLAG, CLAUSE_PRI_OFFER_FLAG, CLAUSE_ESS_COLLECT_FLAG, CLAUSE_PRI_TRUST_FLAG, CLAUSE_PRI_AD_FLAG, CLAUSE_CONFIDENCE_FLAG, ONLINE_AUTH_TYPE, ONLINE_AUTH_INFO, PSTATE, REQUEST_STATE_CODE, OPEN_NO, FILE01, FILE01_MASK, FAXYN, FAXNUM, SCAN_ID, ON_OFF_TYPE, RIP, SYS_RDATE, REQ_WANT_NUMBER, REQ_WANT_NUMBER2, REQ_WANT_NUMBER3, REQ_BUY_TYPE, REQ_MODEL_NAME, REQ_MODEL_COLOR, REQ_PHONE_SN, REQ_USIM_SN, REQ_PAY_TYPE, REQ_ADDITION, SHOP_CD, REQ_IN_DAY, PHONE_PAYMENT, REQ_ADDITION_PRICE, SPC_CODE, CNTPNT_SHOP_ID,SHOP_USM_ID, MEMO, NW_BLCK_AGRM_YN, APP_BLCK_AGRM_YN, REQ_USIM_NAME, APP_CD, SHOP_NM ,PROD_TYPE, CONTRACT_NUM, CLAUSE_FINANCE_FLAG, CLAUSE_RENTAL_MODEL_CP, CLAUSE_RENTAL_MODEL_CP_PR, CLAUSE_RENTAL_SERVICE, RVISN_ID, RVISN_DTTM, PROMOTION_CD, REAL_SHOP_NM, USIM_KINDS_CD /* SRM18072675707, 단체보험 추가 */ , INSR_CD, CLAUSE_INSURANCE_FLAG /* 단말보험 */ , INSR_PROD_CD, CLAUSE_INSR_PROD_FLAG /* 2025-03-04 요금제에 따른 제휴처 제공 동의, 제휴사 제공 동의 추가 */ , CLAUSE_JEHU_FLAG, JEHU_PROD_TYPE, CLAUSE_PARTNER_OFFER_FLAG ) VALUES ( DECODE(#{requestKey }, 'null', '',#{requestKey }), DECODE(#{managerCode }, 'null', '',#{managerCode }), DECODE(#{agentCode }, 'null', '',#{agentCode }), DECODE(#{serviceType }, 'null', '',#{serviceType }), DECODE(#{operType }, 'null', '',#{operType }), DECODE(#{cstmrType }, 'null', '',#{cstmrType }), DECODE(#{resCode }, 'null', '',#{resCode }), DECODE(#{resMsg }, 'null', '',#{resMsg }), DECODE(#{resNo }, 'null', '',#{resNo }), DECODE(#{clausePriCollectFlag },'0', 'N',#{clausePriCollectFlag }), DECODE(#{clausePriOfferFlag }, '0', 'N',#{clausePriOfferFlag }), DECODE(#{clauseEssCollectFlag },'0', 'N',#{clauseEssCollectFlag }), DECODE(#{clausePriTrustFlag }, '0', 'N',#{clausePriTrustFlag }), DECODE(#{clausePriAdFlag }, '0', 'N',#{clausePriAdFlag }), DECODE(#{clauseConfidenceFlag },'0', 'N',#{clauseConfidenceFlag }), DECODE(#{onlineAuthType }, 'null', '',#{onlineAuthType }), DECODE(#{onlineAuthInfo }, 'null', '',#{onlineAuthInfo }), DECODE(#{pstate }, 'null', '',#{pstate }), DECODE(#{requestStateCode }, 'null', '',#{requestStateCode }), DECODE(#{openNo }, 'null', '',#{openNo }), DECODE(#{file01 }, 'null', '',#{file01 }), DECODE(#{file01Mask }, 'null', '',#{file01Mask }), DECODE(#{faxyn }, 'null', '',#{faxyn }), DECODE(#{faxnum }, 'null', '', 'nullnullnull', '', #{faxnum }), DECODE(#{scanId }, 'null', '',#{scanId }), DECODE(#{onOffType }, 'null', '',#{onOffType }), DECODE(#{rip }, 'null', '',#{rip }), SYSDATE, DECODE(#{reqWantNumber }, 'null', '',#{reqWantNumber }), DECODE(#{reqWantNumber2 }, 'null', '',#{reqWantNumber2 }), DECODE(#{reqWantNumber3 }, 'null', '',#{reqWantNumber3 }), DECODE(#{reqBuyType }, 'null', '',#{reqBuyType }), DECODE(#{reqModelName }, 'null', '',#{reqModelName }), DECODE(#{reqModelColor }, 'null', '',#{reqModelColor }), DECODE(#{reqPhoneSn }, 'null', '',#{reqPhoneSn }), DECODE(#{reqUsimSn }, 'null', '',#{reqUsimSn }), DECODE(#{reqPayType }, 'null', '',#{reqPayType }), DECODE(#{additionName }, 'null', '',#{additionName }), (SELECT COMPANY_ID FROM EMV_SCAN_MST@DL_MCP WHERE SCAN_ID = #{scanId}), DECODE(#{reqInDay }, 'null', SYSDATE-1, TO_DATE(#{reqInDay }, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS')), DECODE(#{phonePayment }, 'null', '',#{phonePayment }), DECODE(#{additionPrice }, 'null', '',#{additionPrice }), DECODE(#{spcCode }, 'null', '',#{spcCode }), DECODE(#{cntpntShopId}, 'null', '',#{cntpntShopId}), DECODE(#{shopUsmId}, 'null', '',#{shopUsmId}), DECODE(#{requestMemo}, 'null', '',#{requestMemo}), DECODE(#{nwBlckAgrmYn}, '0', 'N', #{nwBlckAgrmYn}), DECODE(#{appBlckAgrmYn}, '0', 'N', #{appBlckAgrmYn}), DECODE(#{reqUsimName}, 'null', '', #{reqUsimName}), #{appCd}, DECODE(#{shopNm}, 'null', '', DECODE((TRANSLATE(#{shopNm}, '/', '')), NULL, '', #{shopNm})), DECODE(#{prodType}, 'null', '', #{prodType}) , #{contractNum} , DECODE(#{clauseFinanceFlag}, '0', 'N', #{clauseFinanceFlag}) , DECODE(#{clauseRentalModelCp}, '0', 'N', #{clauseRentalModelCp}) , DECODE(#{clauseRentalModelCpPr}, '0', 'N', #{clauseRentalModelCpPr}) , DECODE(#{clauseRentalService}, '0', 'N', #{clauseRentalService}) , #{sessionUserId} , SYSDATE , #{promotionCd} , #{realShopNm} , #{usimKindsCd} , #{insrCd} , DECODE(#{clauseInsuranceFlag}, '0', 'N', #{clauseInsuranceFlag}) , #{insrProdCd} , DECODE(#{clauseInsrProdFlag}, '0', 'N', #{clauseInsrProdFlag}) , DECODE(#{clauseJehuFlag}, '0', 'N',#{clauseJehuFlag}) , #{jehuProdType} , DECODE(#{clausePartnerOfferFlag}, '0', 'N',#{clausePartnerOfferFlag}) )

/* osstMgmtMapper.insertRcpSale */ INSERT INTO MCP_REQUEST_SALEINFO@DL_MCP ( MODEL_ID, REQUEST_KEY, MODEL_MONTHLY, MODEL_INSTALLMENT, MODEL_SALE_POLICY_CODE, RECYCLE_YN, MODEL_DISCOUNT1, SPRT_TP, MAX_DISCOUNT3, DC_AMT, ADD_DC_AMT, RENTAL_BASE_AMT, RENTAL_BASE_DC_AMT, RENTAL_MODEL_CP_AMT, RVISN_ID, RVISN_DTTM ) VALUES ( DECODE(#{modelId}, 'null', '', #{modelId}), DECODE(#{requestKey }, 'null', '', #{requestKey }), DECODE(#{instNom }, 'null', '', #{instNom }), NVL(DECODE(#{modelInstallment }, 'null', '', #{modelInstallment }), 0), DECODE(#{salePlcyCd }, 'null', '', #{salePlcyCd }), DECODE(#{recycleYn}, 'null', '', #{recycleYn}), DECODE(#{modelDiscount1 }, 'null', '', #{modelDiscount1 }), DECODE(#{modelDiscount2 }, 'null', '', #{modelDiscount2 }), DECODE(#{modelDiscount3 }, 'null', '', #{modelDiscount3 }), DECODE(#{socCode }, 'null', '', #{socCode }), DECODE(#{usimPriceType }, 'null', '', #{usimPriceType }), DECODE(#{joinPriceType }, 'null', '', #{joinPriceType }), DECODE(#{joinPrice }, 'null', '', #{joinPrice }), DECODE(#{usimPrice }, 'null', '', #{usimPrice }), DECODE(#{modelPrice }, 'null', '', #{modelPrice }), DECODE(#{agrmTrm }, 'null', '', #{agrmTrm }), TRUNC(DECODE(#{modelPriceVat}, 'null', '', #{modelPriceVat})), DECODE(#{usimPayMthdCd}, 'null', '',#{usimPayMthdCd}), DECODE(#{joinPayMthdCd}, 'null', '',#{joinPayMthdCd}), NVL(DECODE(#{realMdlInstamt}, 'null', '',#{realMdlInstamt}), 0), DECODE(#{sprtTp}, 'null', '', #{sprtTp}), DECODE(#{maxDiscount3}, 'null', '', #{maxDiscount3}), DECODE(#{dcAmt}, 'null', '', #{dcAmt}), DECODE(#{addDcAmt}, 'null', '', #{addDcAmt}), DECODE(#{rentalBaseAmt}, 'null', '', #{rentalBaseAmt}), DECODE(#{rentalBaseDcAmt}, 'null', '', #{rentalBaseDcAmt}), DECODE(#{rentalModelCpAmt}, 'null', '', #{rentalModelCpAmt}), #{sessionUserId}, SYSDATE )

/* osstMgmtMapper.insertRcpReq */ INSERT INTO MCP_REQUEST_REQ@DL_MCP ( REQUEST_KEY, REQ_BANK, REQ_ACCOUNT_NAME, REQ_ACCOUNT_RRN, REQ_ACCOUNT_RELATION, REQ_ACCOUNT_NUMBER, REQ_CARD_NAME, REQ_CARD_RRN, REQ_CARD_COMPANY, REQ_CARD_NO, REQ_CARD_YY, REQ_CARD_MM, REQ_WIRE_TYPE, SYS_RDATE, REQ_PAY_OTHER_FLAG, REQ_PAY_OTHER_TEL_FN, REQ_PAY_OTHER_TEL_MN, REQ_PAY_OTHER_TEL_RN, PRNTS_BILL_NO, RVISN_ID, RVISN_DTTM ) VALUES ( DECODE(#{requestKey}, 'null', '', #{requestKey}), DECODE(#{reqBank}, 'null', '', #{reqBank}), DECODE(#{reqAccountName}, 'null', '', #{reqAccountName}), DECODE(#{reqAccountRrn}, 'null', '', #{reqAccountRrn}), DECODE(#{reqAccountRelation},'null', '', #{reqAccountRelation}), DECODE(#{reqAccountNumber}, 'null', '', #{reqAccountNumber}), DECODE(#{reqCardName}, 'null', '', #{reqCardName}), DECODE(#{reqCardRrn}, 'null', '', #{reqCardRrn}), DECODE(#{reqCardCompany}, 'null', '', #{reqCardCompany}), DECODE(#{reqCardNo}, 'null', '', #{reqCardNo}), DECODE(#{reqCardYy}, 'null', '', #{reqCardYy}), DECODE(#{reqCardMm}, 'null', '', #{reqCardMm}), DECODE(#{reqWireType}, 'null', '', #{reqWireType}), SYSDATE, DECODE(#{reqPayOtherFlag}, '0', 'N', #{reqPayOtherFlag}), DECODE(#{reqPayOtherTelFn}, 'null', '', #{reqPayOtherTelFn}), DECODE(#{reqPayOtherTelMn}, 'null', '', #{reqPayOtherTelMn}), DECODE(#{reqPayOtherTelRn}, 'null', '', #{reqPayOtherTelRn}), DECODE(#{prntsBillNo}, 'null', '', #{prntsBillNo}), #{sessionUserId}, SYSDATE )

/* osstMgmtMapper.insertRcpMove */ INSERT INTO MCP_REQUEST_MOVE@DL_MCP ( REQUEST_KEY, MOVE_COMPANY, MOVE_MOBILE_FN, MOVE_MOBILE_MN, MOVE_MOBILE_RN, MOVE_AUTH_TYPE, MOVE_AUTH_NUMBER, MOVE_THISMONTH_PAY_TYPE, MOVE_ALLOTMENT_STAT, MOVE_REFUND_AGREE_FLAG, SYS_RDATE, REQ_GUIDE_FLAG, REQ_GUIDE_FN, REQ_GUIDE_RN, REQ_GUIDE_MN, RVISN_ID, RVISN_DTTM ) VALUES ( DECODE(#{requestKey}, 'null','',#{requestKey}), DECODE(#{moveCompany}, 'null','',#{moveCompany}), DECODE(#{moveMobileFn}, 'null','',#{moveMobileFn}), DECODE(#{moveMobileMn}, 'null','',#{moveMobileMn}), DECODE(#{moveMobileRn}, 'null','',#{moveMobileRn}), DECODE(#{moveAuthType}, 'null','',#{moveAuthType}), DECODE(#{moveAuthNumber}, 'null','',#{moveAuthNumber}), DECODE(#{moveThismonthPayType}, 'null','',#{moveThismonthPayType}), DECODE(#{moveAllotmentStat}, 'null','',#{moveAllotmentStat}), DECODE(#{moveRefundAgreeFlag}, 'null','',#{moveRefundAgreeFlag}), SYSDATE, DECODE(#{reqGuideFlag}, '0', 'N', #{reqGuideFlag}), DECODE(#{reqGuideFn}, 'null','',#{reqGuideFn}), DECODE(#{reqGuideRn}, 'null','',#{reqGuideRn}), DECODE(#{reqGuideMn}, 'null','',#{reqGuideMn}), #{sessionUserId}, SYSDATE )

/* osstMgmtMapper.insertRcpPay */ INSERT INTO MCP_REQUEST_PAYMENT@DL_MCP ( REQUEST_KEY, REQ_AC_TYPE, REQ_AC01_BALANCE, REQ_AC02_DAY, REQ_AC01_AMOUNT, REQ_AC02_AMOUNT, SYS_RDATE, RVISN_ID, RVISN_DTTM ) VALUES ( DECODE(#{requestKey }, 'null', '', #{requestKey }), DECODE(#{reqAcType }, 'null', '', #{reqAcType }), DECODE(#{reqAc01Balance },'null', '', #{reqAc01Balance }), DECODE(#{reqAc02Day }, 'null', '', #{reqAc02Day }), DECODE(#{reqAc01Amount }, 'null', '', #{reqAcAmount }), DECODE(#{reqAc02Amount }, 'null', '', #{reqAcAmount }), SYSDATE, #{sessionUserId}, SYSDATE )

/* osstMgmtMapper.insertRcpState */ INSERT INTO MCP_REQUEST_STATE@DL_MCP ( REQUEST_STATE_KEY, REQUEST_STATE_CODE, DLVRY_NO, OPEN_NO, MEMO, SYS_RDATE, RIP, RID, VIEW_FLAG, RES_NO, REQUEST_KEY, TB_CD, RVISN_ID, RVISN_DTTM ) VALUES ( #{statusKey}, DECODE(#{requestStateCode}, 'null', '', #{requestStateCode}), DECODE(#{dlvryNo}, 'null', '', #{dlvryNo}), DECODE(#{openNo}, 'null', '', #{openNo}), DECODE(#{memo}, 'null', '', #{memo}), SYSDATE, DECODE(#{rip}, 'null', '', #{rip}), DECODE(#{rid}, 'null', '', #{rid}), 'Y', DECODE(#{resNo}, 'null', '', #{resNo}), DECODE(#{requestKey}, 'null', '', #{requestKey}), DECODE(#{tbCd}, 'null', '', #{tbCd}), #{sessionUserId}, SYSDATE )

/* osstMgmtMapper.insertRcpAddition */ INSERT INTO MCP_REQUEST_ADDITION@DL_MCP ( REQUEST_KEY, ADDITION_KEY, ADDITION_NAME, RANTAL ) SELECT #{requestKey} REQUEST_KEY, ADDITION_KEY, (SELECT ADDITION_NAME FROM MCP_ADDITION@DL_MCP WHERE ADDITION_KEY = A.ADDITION_KEY), NVL((SELECT RANTAL FROM MCP_ADDITION@DL_MCP WHERE ADDITION_KEY = A.ADDITION_KEY), 0) RANTAL FROM( SELECT SUBSTR ( ADDITION_KEY, DECODE (LEVEL, 1, 1, INSTR (ADDITION_KEY, ',', 1, LEVEL - 1) + LENGTH (',')), DECODE ( LEVEL, LENGTH (ADDITION_KEY) - LENGTH (REPLACE (ADDITION_KEY, ',', '')) + 1, LENGTH (ADDITION_KEY) + LENGTH (','), INSTR (ADDITION_KEY, ',', 1, LEVEL)) - DECODE (LEVEL, 1, 1, INSTR (ADDITION_KEY, ',', 1, LEVEL - 1) + LENGTH (','))) AS ADDITION_KEY FROM ( SELECT #{additionKey} ADDITION_KEY FROM DUAL) CONNECT BY LEVEL <= LENGTH (ADDITION_KEY) - LENGTH (REPLACE (ADDITION_KEY, ',', '')) + 1 ) A

/* osstMgmtMapper.insertMspMove */ INSERT INTO MSP_REQUEST_MOVE ( REQUEST_KEY , MOVE_COMPANY , MOVE_MOBILE_FN , MOVE_MOBILE_MN , MOVE_MOBILE_RN , MOVE_AUTH_TYPE , MOVE_AUTH_NUMBER , MOVE_THISMONTH_PAY_TYPE , MOVE_ALLOTMENT_STAT , MOVE_REFUND_AGREE_FLAG , SYS_RDATE , REQ_GUIDE_FLAG , REQ_GUIDE_FN , REQ_GUIDE_RN , REQ_GUIDE_MN ) SELECT REQUEST_KEY , MOVE_COMPANY , MOVE_MOBILE_FN , MOVE_MOBILE_MN , MOVE_MOBILE_RN , MOVE_AUTH_TYPE , MOVE_AUTH_NUMBER , MOVE_THISMONTH_PAY_TYPE , MOVE_ALLOTMENT_STAT , MOVE_REFUND_AGREE_FLAG , SYS_RDATE , REQ_GUIDE_FLAG , REQ_GUIDE_FN , REQ_GUIDE_RN , REQ_GUIDE_MN FROM MCP_REQUEST_MOVE@DL_MCP A WHERE REQUEST_KEY = #{requestKey} AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM MSP_REQUEST_MOVE WHERE REQUEST_KEY = A.REQUEST_KEY)

/* osstMgmtMapper.insertMspPay */ INSERT INTO MSP_REQUEST_PAYMENT ( REQUEST_KEY , REQ_AC_TYPE , REQ_AC01_BALANCE , REQ_AC02_DAY , REQ_AC01_AMOUNT , REQ_AC02_AMOUNT , SYS_RDATE ) SELECT REQUEST_KEY , REQ_AC_TYPE , REQ_AC01_BALANCE , REQ_AC02_DAY , REQ_AC01_AMOUNT , REQ_AC02_AMOUNT , SYS_RDATE FROM MCP_REQUEST_PAYMENT@DL_MCP A WHERE REQUEST_KEY = #{requestKey} AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM MSP_REQUEST_PAYMENT WHERE REQUEST_KEY = A.REQUEST_KEY)

/* osstMgmtMapper.insertMspAgent */ INSERT INTO MSP_REQUEST_AGENT ( REQUEST_KEY , MINOR_AGENT_NAME , MINOR_AGENT_RRN , MINOR_AGENT_TEL_FN , MINOR_AGENT_TEL_MN , MINOR_AGENT_TEL_RN , MINOR_AGENT_RELATION , JRDCL_AGENT_NAME , JRDCL_AGENT_RRN , JRDCL_AGENT_TEL_FN , JRDCL_AGENT_TEL_MN , JRDCL_AGENT_TEL_RN , ENTRUST_REQ_NM , ENTRUST_RES_NM , ENTRUST_REQ_RELATION , ENTRUST_RES_RRN , ENTRUST_RES_TEL_FN , ENTRUST_RES_TEL_MN , ENTRUST_RES_TEL_RN , SYS_RDATE ) SELECT REQUEST_KEY , MINOR_AGENT_NAME , MINOR_AGENT_RRN , MINOR_AGENT_TEL_FN , MINOR_AGENT_TEL_MN , MINOR_AGENT_TEL_RN , MINOR_AGENT_RELATION , JRDCL_AGENT_NAME , JRDCL_AGENT_RRN , JRDCL_AGENT_TEL_FN , JRDCL_AGENT_TEL_MN , JRDCL_AGENT_TEL_RN , ENTRUST_REQ_NM , ENTRUST_RES_NM , ENTRUST_REQ_RELATION , ENTRUST_RES_RRN , ENTRUST_RES_TEL_FN , ENTRUST_RES_TEL_MN , ENTRUST_RES_TEL_RN , SYS_RDATE FROM MCP_REQUEST_AGENT@DL_MCP A WHERE REQUEST_KEY = #{requestKey} AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM MSP_REQUEST_AGENT WHERE REQUEST_KEY = A.REQUEST_KEY)

/* osstMgmtMapper.insertMspState */ INSERT INTO MSP_REQUEST_STATE ( REQUEST_STATE_KEY , REQUEST_STATE_CODE , DLVRY_NO , OPEN_NO , MEMO , SYS_RDATE , RIP , RID , VIEW_FLAG , RES_NO , REQUEST_KEY , TB_CD ) SELECT REQUEST_STATE_KEY , REQUEST_STATE_CODE , DLVRY_NO , OPEN_NO , MEMO , SYS_RDATE , RIP , RID , VIEW_FLAG , RES_NO , REQUEST_KEY , TB_CD FROM MCP_REQUEST_STATE@DL_MCP A WHERE REQUEST_KEY = #{requestKey} AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM MSP_REQUEST_STATE WHERE REQUEST_KEY = A.REQUEST_KEY)

/* osstMgmtMapper.insertMspChange */ INSERT INTO MSP_REQUEST_CHANGE ( NAME_CHANGE_NM , NAME_CHANGE_TEL_FN , NAME_CHANGE_TEL_MN , NAME_CHANGE_TEL_RN , NAME_CHANGE_RRN , NAME_CHANGE_PINSTALLMENT , REQUEST_KEY , SYS_RDATE ) SELECT NAME_CHANGE_NM , NAME_CHANGE_TEL_FN , NAME_CHANGE_TEL_MN , NAME_CHANGE_TEL_RN , NAME_CHANGE_RRN , NAME_CHANGE_PINSTALLMENT , REQUEST_KEY , SYS_RDATE FROM MCP_REQUEST_CHANGE@DL_MCP A WHERE REQUEST_KEY = #{requestKey} AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM MSP_REQUEST_CHANGE WHERE REQUEST_KEY = A.REQUEST_KEY)

/* osstMgmtMapper.insertMspDvcChg */ INSERT INTO MSP_REQUEST_DVC_CHG ( REQUEST_KEY , DVC_CHG_TYPE , DVC_CHG_RSN_CD , DVC_CHG_RSN_DTL_CD , REGST_DTTM ) SELECT REQUEST_KEY , DVC_CHG_TYPE , DVC_CHG_RSN_CD , DVC_CHG_RSN_DTL_CD , REGST_DTTM FROM MCP_REQUEST_DVC_CHG@DL_MCP A WHERE REQUEST_KEY = #{requestKey} AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM MSP_REQUEST_DVC_CHG WHERE REQUEST_KEY = A.REQUEST_KEY)
mapper.select:
/* osstMgmtMapper.getAppFormData */
SELECT CASE WHEN MAINDATA.MODEL_MONTHLY_SUB = 1 then 0 WHEN MODEL_PRICE-(MAINDATA.OPEN_DISCOUNT + MAINDATA.ADD_DISCOUNT) <= 0 then 0 ELSE TRUNC((MODEL_PRICE-(MAINDATA.OPEN_DISCOUNT + MAINDATA.ADD_DISCOUNT))*0.059/12*POWER((1+0.059/12), MODEL_MONTHLY)/(POWER((1+0.059/12), MODEL_MONTHLY)-1),0) - TRUNC(((MODEL_PRICE-(MAINDATA.OPEN_DISCOUNT + MAINDATA.ADD_DISCOUNT))/MODEL_MONTHLY),0) END AS MODEL_MM_CHARGE, CASE WHEN INST_AMT <= 0 THEN 0 ELSE DECODE(MAINDATA.MODEL_MONTHLY_SUB, 1, 0, ROUND( (INST_AMT + ( TRUNC(INST_AMT * 0.059 / 12 * VAL_POW / (VAL_POW-1),0) * MODEL_MONTHLY_SUB - INST_AMT) ) / MODEL_MONTHLY_SUB ,0) ) END AS MODEL_MM_PAYMENT, /*핸드폰 월 납부액 단말요금 : (할부원금+총할부수수료)/할부개월수 */ CASE WHEN MAINDATA.MODEL_MONTHLY_SUB = 1 THEN 0 WHEN MODEL_PRICE-(MAINDATA.OPEN_DISCOUNT + MAINDATA.ADD_DISCOUNT) <= 0 THEN 0 ELSE DECODE(MAINDATA.MODEL_MONTHLY_SUB, 1, 0, TRUNC((MODEL_PRICE-(MAINDATA.OPEN_DISCOUNT + MAINDATA.ADD_DISCOUNT))/ MAINDATA.MODEL_MONTHLY_SUB) ) END AS REAL_MM_MONEY, /* 월 할부금 */ CASE WHEN INST_AMT > 0 THEN DECODE(MAINDATA.MODEL_MONTHLY_SUB, 1, MAINDATA.TEL_MM_PATMENT, ROUND( ( INST_AMT + ( TRUNC(INST_AMT * 0.059 / 12 * VAL_POW / (VAL_POW-1),0) * MODEL_MONTHLY_SUB - INST_AMT ) ) / MODEL_MONTHLY_SUB ,0) + MAINDATA.TEL_MM_PATMENT ) ELSE MAINDATA.TEL_MM_PATMENT END AS BASIC_MM_PAYMENT, MAINDATA.OPEN_DISCOUNT + MAINDATA.ADD_DISCOUNT AS CONTRACT_SUPPORT, MODEL_MONTHLY, '4' AS PAGE4DEFAULT, MAINDATA.* FROM ( SELECT REQUEST_KEY, MODEL_PRICE-(NVL(MODEL_DISCOUNT1, 0) + NVL(MODEL_DISCOUNT2, 0) + NVL(MODEL_DISCOUNT3, 0)) AS INST_AMT , -- 할부원금 POWER((1+0.059/12), MODEL_MONTHLY_SUB) AS VAL_POW , -- 년 수수년 계산 CASE WHEN SPRT_TP = 'KD' THEN '0' WHEN SPRT_TP = 'PM' THEN '2' WHEN REQ_BUY_TYPE = 'UU' AND ENGG_MNTH_CNT > 1 THEN '1' ELSE '' END DISCOUNTPR, MODEL_PRICE , PROD_TYPE , /* GREATEST(NVL( (MODEL_PRICE ) - NVL(MODEL_DISCOUNT1, 0) - NVL(MODEL_DISCOUNT2, 0) - NVL(MODEL_DISCOUNT3, 0), 0),0) AS MODEL_INSTALLMENT, */ DECODE( PROD_TYPE,'02','0', '01',GREATEST(NVL( (MODEL_PRICE ) - NVL(MODEL_DISCOUNT1, 0) - NVL(MODEL_DISCOUNT2, 0) - NVL(MODEL_DISCOUNT3, 0), 0),0), NULL,GREATEST(NVL( (MODEL_PRICE ) - NVL(MODEL_DISCOUNT1, 0) - NVL(MODEL_DISCOUNT2, 0) - NVL(MODEL_DISCOUNT3, 0), 0),0) ) AS MODEL_INSTALLMENT, NVL(MODEL_DISCOUNT1, 0) + NVL(MODEL_DISCOUNT2, 0) AS OPEN_DISCOUNT, NVL(MODEL_DISCOUNT3, 0) AS ADD_DISCOUNT, 0 AS MODEL_DISCOUNT, NVL(INST_INTRATE, 0.25 ) AS INST_INTRATE, MODEL_MONTHLY_SUB, RES_NO, OPER_TYPE, CSTMR_TYPE_ORG, CSTMR_TYPE, ETC_SPECIAL, REQ_USIM_NAME, REQ_USIM_SN, PHONE_PAYMENT, REQ_IN_DAY_YYYY, REQ_IN_DAY_MM, REQ_IN_DAY_DD, REQ_ADDITION, REQ_ADDITION_PRICE, USIM_PRICE_TYPE, USIM_PRICE, JOIN_PRICE_TYPE, CSTMR_NAME, CSTMR_NATIVE_RRN, CSTMR_FOREIGNER_RRN, CSTMR_FOREIGNER_NATION, CSTMR_FOREIGNER_PN, CSTMR_RECEIVE_TEL_FN, CSTMR_BILL_SEND_CODE, CSTMR_MAIL, CSTMR_FOREIGNER_SDATE_YYYY, CSTMR_FOREIGNER_SDATE_MM, CSTMR_FOREIGNER_SDATE_DD, CSTMR_FOREIGNER_EDATE_YYYY, CSTMR_FOREIGNER_EDATE_MM, CSTMR_FOREIGNER_EDATE_DD, CSTMR_ADDR, CSTMR_ADDR_BJD, CSTMR_PRIVATE_NUMBER, CSTMR_JURIDICAL_NUMBER, CSTMR_JURIDICAL_RRN, REQ_PAY_TYPE, REQ_BANK, REQ_ACCOUNT_NUMBER, REQ_CARD_YY, REQ_CARD_MM, REQ_ACCOUNT_NAME, REQ_ACCOUNT_RELATION, REQ_WANT_NUMBER, REQ_WANT_NUMBER2, REQ_WANT_NUMBER3, REQ_WIRE_TYPE, REQ_AC01_BALANCE, REQ_AC01_AMOUNT, REQ_AC02_DAY, REQ_AC02_AMOUNT, REQ_GUIDE, REQ_GUIDE_FN, REQ_GUIDE_MN, REQ_GUIDE_RN, MOVE_MOBILE_FN, MOVE_AUTH_TYPE, MOVE_AUTH_NUMBER_1, MOVE_AUTH_NUMBER_2, MOVE_AUTH_NUMBER_3, MOVE_AUTH_NUMBER_4, MOVE_THISMONTH_PAY_TYPE, MOVE_ALLOTMENT_STAT, MOVE_REFUND_AGREE_FLAG, MOVE_COMPANY, MOVE_COMPANY_MVNO, TRUNC (MONTHLY_FEE * 1.1, -1) AS MONTHLY_FEE, DISCOUNT_PRICE, RATE_NAME, TEL_MM_PATMENT, REQ_CARD_COMPANY, REQ_CARD_NO, PAGE3DEFAULT, AGENT_CODE, NAME_CHANGE_NM, NAME_CHANGE_TEL_FN, NAME_CHANGE_RRN, NAME_CHANGE_PINSTALLMENT, MINOR_AGENT_NAME, MINOR_AGENT_RELATION, MINOR_AGENT_RRN, MINOR_AGENT_TEL_FN, ENTRUST_REQ_NM, ENTRUST_RES_NM, ENTRUST_REQ_RELATION, ENTRUST_RES_RRN, ENTRUST_RES_TEL_FN, SERVICE_TYPE, REQ_PAY_OTHER_FLAG, REQ_CARD_NAME, CLAUSE_PRI_AD_FLAG, REQ_BUY_TYPE, DECODE(REQ_BUY_TYPE,'MM','P',DECODE(USIM_KINDS_CD,'09','E','U')) AS USIM_KINDS_CD, -- USIM, eSIM , 단말기 구분 REQ_MODEL_NAME, (SELECT CD_DSC FROM CMN_GRP_CD_MST WHERE GRP_ID = 'CMN0044' AND CD_VAL = REQ_MODEL_COLOR) AS REQ_MODEL_COLOR, CASE WHEN TO_NUMBER(MODEL_MONTHLY_SUB) <= 1 THEN 'R' WHEN TO_NUMBER(MODEL_MONTHLY_SUB) > 1 THEN 'P' ELSE 'S' END AS MODEL_MONTHLY_TYPE, OTHERS_PAYMENT_RRN, OTHERS_PAYMENT_AG, OTHERS_PAYMENT_NM, OTHERS_PAYMENT_RELATION, SOC_CODE, CNTPNT_SHOP_ID, MODEL_SALE_POLICY_CODE, ENGG_MNTH_CNT, NW_BLCK_AGRM_YN, APP_BLCK_AGRM_YN, CLAUSE_JEHU_FLAG, APP_CD, APP_CD_NAME,ETC_DISCOUNT, MODEL_MONTHLY, NVL(CLAUSE_RENTAL_MODEL_CP,'N')AS CLAUSE_RENTAL_MODEL_CP, --단말배상금 안내사항 동의여부 NVL(CLAUSE_RENTAL_MODEL_CP_PR,'N')AS CLAUSE_RENTAL_MODEL_CP_PR, --단말배상금(부분파손) 안내사항 동의여부 NVL(CLAUSE_RENTAL_SERVICE,'N')AS CLAUSE_RENTAL_SERVICE, --중고렌탈 프로그램 서비스 이용에 대한 동의서 동의여부 CLAUSE_MPPS35_FLAG, --선불요금제 MPPS35 제약사항 동의 여부 CLAUSE_FINANCE_FLAG, --동부화재 제휴 요금제 약관 동의 여부 PRNTS_BILL_NO, ONLINE_AUTH_TYPE, NVL(CLAUSE_5G_COVERAGE_FLAG,'N' ) AS CLAUSE_5G_COVERAGE_FLAG, --5g 커버리지 확인 및 가입 동의 NVL(PERSONAL_INFO_COLLECT_AGREE,'N') AS PERSONAL_INFO_COLLECT_AGREE, --개인정보 수집이용 동의(혜택) NVL(OTHERS_TRNS_AGREE,'N') AS OTHERS_TRNS_AGREE, --제 3자 제공 동의 NVL(CLAUSE_PARTNER_OFFER_FLAG,'N') AS CLAUSE_PARTNER_OFFER_FLAG, --개인정보 제3자 제공 동의(제휴사) OPEN_MARKET_REFERER, --제휴사 JEHU_PROD_TYPE --제휴처(제휴요금제) FROM ( SELECT A.*, TRUNC( ( (NVL(b.DC_AMT,0) ) + NVL(b.ADD_DC_AMT,0)) * 1.1 , 0) AS DISCOUNT_PRICE, TRUNC(A.MONTHLY_FEE * 1.1 - ( ((NVL(b.DC_AMT,0)) + NVL(b.ADD_DC_AMT,0)) * 1.1), -1) AS TEL_MM_PATMENT FROM ( SELECT MQ.REQUEST_KEY, OSPM.INST_RATE AS INST_INTRATE, MQ.ONLINE_AUTH_INFO AS RES_NO, MRS.SOC_CODE, MQ.CNTPNT_SHOP_ID, MRS.MODEL_SALE_POLICY_CODE, DECODE(MQ.PROD_TYPE,'01',MRS.MODEL_PRICE + MRS.MODEL_PRICE_VAT,NULL,MRS.MODEL_PRICE + MRS.MODEL_PRICE_VAT,'02',MRS.RENTAL_MODEL_CP_AMT) AS MODEL_PRICE, MQ.PROD_TYPE, MRS.MODEL_DISCOUNT1, MRS.MODEL_DISCOUNT2, MRS.MODEL_DISCOUNT3, CASE WHEN OOIM.ORGN_NM IS NOT NULL THEN OOIM.ORGN_NM WHEN MQ.CNTPNT_SHOP_ID = '1100011741' THEN 'M모바일(직영온라인)' WHEN MQ.CNTPNT_SHOP_ID = '1100011744' THEN 'M모바일(사내특판)' WHEN MQ.CNTPNT_SHOP_ID = '1100011745' THEN '총판((주)프리피아)' WHEN MQ.CNTPNT_SHOP_ID = '1100005928' THEN 'M모바일(직영온라인)' WHEN MQ.CNTPNT_SHOP_ID = '1100013265' THEN '홈쇼핑' ELSE '온라인' END AS AGENT_CODE, MQ.OPER_TYPE, CSTMR_TYPE AS CSTMR_TYPE_ORG, DECODE(CSTMR_TYPE , 'NM','NA','FN','NE',CSTMR_TYPE) AS CSTMR_TYPE, MQ.ETC_SPECIAL, MQ.REQ_USIM_NAME, TO_CHAR (MQ.REQ_USIM_SN) AS REQ_USIM_SN, PHONE_PAYMENT, SUBSTR (TO_CHAR (MQ.REQ_IN_DAY, 'YYYYMMDD'), 1, 4) AS REQ_IN_DAY_YYYY, SUBSTR (TO_CHAR (MQ.REQ_IN_DAY, 'YYYYMMDD'), 5, 2) AS REQ_IN_DAY_MM, SUBSTR (TO_CHAR (MQ.REQ_IN_DAY, 'YYYYMMDD'), 7, 2) AS REQ_IN_DAY_DD, DECODE (NVL (MRS.MODEL_MONTHLY, 0), '0', '1', MRS.MODEL_MONTHLY) AS MODEL_MONTHLY_SUB, /** 할부 개월수 **/ MODEL_MONTHLY, MQ.REQ_ADDITION, TO_CHAR (MQ.REQ_ADDITION_PRICE) AS REQ_ADDITION_PRICE, MRS.USIM_PRICE_TYPE, TO_CHAR (MRS.USIM_PRICE) AS USIM_PRICE, MRS.JOIN_PRICE_TYPE, MRC.CSTMR_NAME, /**substr(MRC.CSTMR_NATIVE_RRN,1,6) AS CSTMR_NATIVE_RRN, **/ CSTMR_NATIVE_RRN, MRC.CSTMR_FOREIGNER_RRN, MRC.CSTMR_FOREIGNER_NATION, MRC.CSTMR_FOREIGNER_PN, MRC.CSTMR_TEL_FN || '-' || MRC.CSTMR_TEL_MN || '-' || MRC.CSTMR_TEL_RN || ',' || MRC.CSTMR_MOBILE_FN || '-' || MRC.CSTMR_MOBILE_MN || '-' || MRC.CSTMR_MOBILE_RN AS CSTMR_RECEIVE_TEL_FN, MRC.CSTMR_BILL_SEND_CODE, MRC.CSTMR_MAIL, SUBSTR (MRC.CSTMR_FOREIGNER_SDATE, 1, 4) AS CSTMR_FOREIGNER_SDATE_YYYY, SUBSTR (MRC.CSTMR_FOREIGNER_SDATE, 5, 2) AS CSTMR_FOREIGNER_SDATE_MM, SUBSTR (MRC.CSTMR_FOREIGNER_SDATE, 7, 2) AS CSTMR_FOREIGNER_SDATE_DD, SUBSTR (MRC.CSTMR_FOREIGNER_EDATE, 1, 4) AS CSTMR_FOREIGNER_EDATE_YYYY, SUBSTR (MRC.CSTMR_FOREIGNER_EDATE, 5, 2) AS CSTMR_FOREIGNER_EDATE_MM, SUBSTR (MRC.CSTMR_FOREIGNER_EDATE, 7, 2) AS CSTMR_FOREIGNER_EDATE_DD, MRC.CSTMR_ADDR || ' ' || MRC.CSTMR_ADDR_DTL AS CSTMR_ADDR, MRC.CSTMR_ADDR_BJD, MRC.OTHERS_PAYMENT_RNM, MRC.CSTMR_PRIVATE_NUMBER, MRC.CSTMR_JURIDICAL_NUMBER, MRC.CSTMR_JURIDICAL_RRN, MCENB.CODE_NAME AS REQ_BANK, MRR.REQ_ACCOUNT_NUMBER, MRR.REQ_CARD_YY, REQ_CARD_MM, MRR.REQ_ACCOUNT_NAME, MRR.REQ_ACCOUNT_RELATION, MRR.REQ_CARD_COMPANY, MRR.REQ_CARD_NO, MQ.REQ_WANT_NUMBER, MQ.REQ_WANT_NUMBER2, MQ.REQ_WANT_NUMBER3, MRR.REQ_WIRE_TYPE, MQ.REQ_PAY_TYPE, TO_CHAR (MRP.REQ_AC01_BALANCE) AS REQ_AC01_BALANCE, TO_CHAR (MRP.REQ_AC01_AMOUNT) AS REQ_AC01_AMOUNT, MRP.REQ_AC02_DAY, TO_CHAR (MRP.REQ_AC02_AMOUNT) AS REQ_AC02_AMOUNT, CASE WHEN(MRM.REQ_GUIDE_MN IS NOT NULL ) THEN MRM.REQ_GUIDE_FN||'-'||MRM.REQ_GUIDE_MN||'-'||MRM.REQ_GUIDE_RN ELSE '' END AS REQ_GUIDE, MRM.REQ_GUIDE_FN, MRM.REQ_GUIDE_MN, MRM.REQ_GUIDE_RN, DECODE (MRM.MOVE_MOBILE_MN, NULL, NULL, MRM.MOVE_MOBILE_FN || '-' || MRM.MOVE_MOBILE_MN || '-' || MRM.MOVE_MOBILE_RN) AS MOVE_MOBILE_FN, MRM.MOVE_AUTH_TYPE, SUBSTR (MRM.MOVE_AUTH_NUMBER, 1, 1) AS MOVE_AUTH_NUMBER_1, SUBSTR (MRM.MOVE_AUTH_NUMBER, 2, 1) AS MOVE_AUTH_NUMBER_2, SUBSTR (MRM.MOVE_AUTH_NUMBER, 3, 1) AS MOVE_AUTH_NUMBER_3, SUBSTR (MRM.MOVE_AUTH_NUMBER, 4, 1) AS MOVE_AUTH_NUMBER_4, MRM.MOVE_THISMONTH_PAY_TYPE, MRM.MOVE_ALLOTMENT_STAT, MRM.MOVE_REFUND_AGREE_FLAG, CASE WHEN MRM.MOVE_COMPANY IN ('SKT', 'LGT', 'KTF') THEN MRM.MOVE_COMPANY WHEN MRM.MOVE_COMPANY IS NOT NULL THEN 'MVNO' ELSE '' END AS MOVE_COMPANY, CASE WHEN MRM.MOVE_COMPANY IN ('SKT', 'LGT', 'KTF') THEN '' ELSE MC.CODE_NAME END AS MOVE_COMPANY_MVNO, MR.BASE_AMT AS MONTHLY_FEE, MR.RATE_NM AS RATE_NAME, '3' AS PAGE3DEFAULT, MRCG.NAME_CHANGE_NM, DECODE (MRCG.NAME_CHANGE_TEL_MN, NULL, NULL, MRCG.NAME_CHANGE_TEL_FN || '-' || MRCG.NAME_CHANGE_TEL_MN || '-' || MRCG.NAME_CHANGE_TEL_RN) AS NAME_CHANGE_TEL_FN, MRCG.NAME_CHANGE_RRN, MRCG.NAME_CHANGE_PINSTALLMENT, MRA.MINOR_AGENT_NAME, MCMINOR.CODE_NAME AS MINOR_AGENT_RELATION, MRA.MINOR_AGENT_RRN, DECODE(MRA.MINOR_AGENT_TEL_FN, NULL, NULL, MRA.MINOR_AGENT_TEL_FN || '-' || MRA.MINOR_AGENT_TEL_MN || '-' || MRA.MINOR_AGENT_TEL_RN) AS MINOR_AGENT_TEL_FN, MRA.ENTRUST_REQ_NM, MRA.ENTRUST_RES_NM, MCENT.CODE_NAME AS ENTRUST_REQ_RELATION, MRR.REQ_CARD_NAME, MRA.ENTRUST_RES_RRN, MQ.SERVICE_TYPE, MQ.CLAUSE_PRI_AD_FLAG, MQ.REQ_BUY_TYPE, MQ.USIM_KINDS_CD, MQ.REQ_MODEL_NAME, MQ.REQ_MODEL_COLOR, DECODE ( MRA.ENTRUST_RES_TEL_FN, NULL, NULL, MRA.ENTRUST_RES_TEL_FN || '-' || MRA.ENTRUST_RES_TEL_MN || '-' || MRA.ENTRUST_RES_TEL_RN) AS ENTRUST_RES_TEL_FN, MRR.REQ_PAY_OTHER_FLAG, CASE WHEN REQ_PAY_TYPE = 'C' THEN REQ_CARD_RRN WHEN REQ_PAY_TYPE = 'D' THEN REQ_ACCOUNT_RRN ELSE CSTMR_NATIVE_RRN END AS OTHERS_PAYMENT_RRN, CASE WHEN MINOR_AGENT_NAME IS NOT NULL OR (REQ_PAY_TYPE = 'C' AND REQ_PAY_OTHER_FLAG = 'Y') OR (REQ_PAY_TYPE = 'D' AND REQ_PAY_OTHER_FLAG = 'Y') THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS OTHERS_PAYMENT_AG, CASE WHEN REQ_PAY_TYPE = 'C' THEN REQ_CARD_NAME WHEN REQ_PAY_TYPE = 'D' THEN REQ_ACCOUNT_NAME ELSE CSTMR_NAME END AS OTHERS_PAYMENT_NM, /* NVL(MCMINOR.CODE_NAME, '본인') AS OTHERS_PAYMENT_RELATION, */ MCMINOR.CODE_NAME AS OTHERS_PAYMENT_RELATION, NVL( MRS.ENGG_MNTH_CNT, 0 ) AS ENGG_MNTH_CNT, MQ.NW_BLCK_AGRM_YN, MQ.APP_BLCK_AGRM_YN, MQ.CLAUSE_JEHU_FLAG, DECODE(MQ.APP_CD,'1','1','3','3',null,'' ,'','','0')AS APP_CD, (SELECT CODE_NAME FROM MCP_CODE@DL_MCP WHERE CODE_SYS = 'CHA' AND CODE = MQ.APP_CD) AS APP_CD_NAME, '0'AS ETC_DISCOUNT, MRS.SPRT_TP, /* 지원금 유형 */ MRS.MODEL_ID, MR.RATE_CD, OSPM.SALE_PLCY_CD, MQ.CLAUSE_RENTAL_MODEL_CP, --단말배상금 안내사항 동의여부 MQ.CLAUSE_RENTAL_MODEL_CP_PR, --단말배상금(부분파손) 안내사항 동의여부 MQ.CLAUSE_RENTAL_SERVICE, --중고렌탈 프로그램 서비스 이용에 대한 동의서 동의여부 MQ.CLAUSE_MPPS35_FLAG, --선불요금제 MPPS35 제약사항 동의 여부 MQ.CLAUSE_FINANCE_FLAG, --동부화재 제휴 요금제 약관 동의 여부 MRR.PRNTS_BILL_NO, MQ.ONLINE_AUTH_TYPE, MQ.CLAUSE_5G_COVERAGE_FLAG, --5g 커버리지 확인 및 가입 동의 MQ.PERSONAL_INFO_COLLECT_AGREE, --개인정보 수집이용 동의(혜택) MQ.OTHERS_TRNS_AGREE, --제 3자 제공 동의 MQ.CLAUSE_PARTNER_OFFER_FLAG, --개인정보 제3자 제공 동의(제휴사) MQ.OPEN_MARKET_REFERER, --제휴사 MQ.JEHU_PROD_TYPE --제휴처(제휴요금제) FROM MCP_REQUEST@DL_MCP MQ, MCP_REQUEST_CSTMR@DL_MCP MRC, MCP_REQUEST_REQ@DL_MCP MRR, MCP_REQUEST_PAYMENT@DL_MCP MRP, MCP_REQUEST_MOVE@DL_MCP MRM, MCP_REQUEST_SALEINFO@DL_MCP MRS, MCP_CODE@DL_MCP MC, MCP_REQUEST_CHANGE@DL_MCP MRCG, MCP_REQUEST_AGENT@DL_MCP MRA, MCP_CODE@DL_MCP MCMINOR, MCP_CODE@DL_MCP MCENT, MCP_CODE@DL_MCP MCENB, MSP_RATE_MST MR, ORG_ORGN_INFO_MST OOIM, MSP_SALE_PLCY_MST OSPM WHERE MQ.REQUEST_KEY = #{requestKey} AND MRC.REQUEST_KEY = MQ.REQUEST_KEY AND MRC.REQUEST_KEY = MRR.REQUEST_KEY(+) AND MRC.REQUEST_KEY = MRP.REQUEST_KEY(+) AND MRC.REQUEST_KEY = MRS.REQUEST_KEY AND MRC.REQUEST_KEY = MRM.REQUEST_KEY(+) AND MRC.REQUEST_KEY = MRCG.REQUEST_KEY(+) AND MRC.REQUEST_KEY = MRA.REQUEST_KEY(+) AND MC.CODE_SYS(+) = 'NSC' AND MC.CODE(+) = MRM.MOVE_COMPANY AND MRS.SOC_CODE = MR.RATE_CD AND MCMINOR.CODE_SYS(+) = 'AGR' AND MCMINOR.CODE(+) = MRA.MINOR_AGENT_RELATION AND MCENT.CODE_SYS(+) = 'AGR' AND MCENT.CODE(+) = MRA.ENTRUST_REQ_RELATION AND MCENB.CODE_SYS(+) = 'BNK' AND MCENB.CODE(+) = MRR.REQ_BANK AND MQ.CNTPNT_SHOP_ID = OOIM.ORGN_ID(+) AND MRS.MODEL_SALE_POLICY_CODE = OSPM.SALE_PLCY_CD(+) )A, MSP_SALE_SUBSD_MST B WHERE A.SALE_PLCY_CD = B.SALE_PLCY_CD(+) AND A.SOC_CODE = B.RATE_CD(+) AND A.MODEL_ID = B.PRDT_ID(+) AND A.ENGG_MNTH_CNT = B.AGRM_TRM(+) AND A.CNTPNT_SHOP_ID = B.ORGN_ID(+) AND A.OPER_TYPE = B.OPER_TYPE(+)) APPDATA ) MAINDATA

/* osstMgmtMapper.getAppFormPointGroupList */ SELECT A.GROUP_CODE, B.PAGE_SEQ, C.PAGE_CODE, C.COLUMN_NAME, C.METAROW, C.METALINE, C.CODEDATA, C.CODEDATA_YN, C.DELETECOLUMNYN FROM NMCP_APP_GROUP_MST@DL_MCP A, NMCP_APP_GROUP_INFO@DL_MCP B, NMCP_APP_FORM_INFO@DL_MCP C WHERE A.STATUS = 'A' AND A.GROUP_CODE = #{groupCode} AND A.GROUP_CODE = B.GROUP_CODE AND B.STATUS = 'A' AND B.PAGE_CODE = C.PAGE_CODE ORDER BY B.PAGE_SEQ, C.APP_KEY

/* osstMgmtMapper.getMcpCodeList */ SELECT A.CD_GROUP_ID , B.DTL_CD , COUNT(1) OVER() AS TOTAL_CNT FROM NMCP_CD_GROUP_BAS@DL_MCP A , NMCP_CD_DTL@DL_MCP B WHERE A.CD_GROUP_ID = B.CD_GROUP_ID AND A.CD_GROUP_ID = #{groupId} AND A.USE_YN = 'Y' /* M포털 리뉴얼로 유효기간 조건 추가 */ AND (B.PSTNG_START_DATE IS NULL OR B.PSTNG_END_DATE IS NULL OR SYSDATE BETWEEN TO_DATE(B.PSTNG_START_DATE, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') AND TO_DATE(B.PSTNG_END_DATE, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS')) AND (A.PSTNG_START_DATE IS NULL OR A.PSTNG_END_DATE IS NULL OR SYSDATE BETWEEN TO_DATE(A.PSTNG_START_DATE, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') AND TO_DATE(A.PSTNG_END_DATE, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'))

/* osstMgmtMapper.getAppFormUserData */ SELECT MRC.CSTMR_NAME , MQ.RES_NO , MQ.AGENT_CODE , MQ.CNTPNT_SHOP_ID FROM MCP_REQUEST@DL_MCP MQ , MCP_REQUEST_CSTMR@DL_MCP MRC WHERE MQ.REQUEST_KEY = #{requestKey} AND MQ.REQUEST_KEY = MRC.REQUEST_KEY
mapper.update: /* osstMgmtMapper.updateOsstRequestDtl */ UPDATE MSP_REQUEST_DTL SET SCAN_ID = #{scanId}, REQUEST_KEY = #{requestKey}, REQ_IN_DAY = #{reqInDay}, RVISN_DTTM = SYSDATE WHERE CONTRACT_NUM = #{contractNum}

/* osstMgmtMapper.updateMspRequestDtl */ UPDATE MSP_REQUEST_DTL SET ON_OFF_TYPE = #{onOffType}, RES_NO = #{resNo}, REQ_BUY_TYPE = #{reqBuyType}, REQ_BUY_TYPE_NM = #{reqBuyTypeNm}, OPER_TYPE = #{operType}, OPER_TYPE_NM = #{operTypeNm}, MOVE_COMPANY = #{moveCompany}, MOVE_COMPANY_NM = #{moveCompanyNm}, SALE_PLCY_CD = #{salePlcyCd}, SALE_PLCY_NM = #{salePlcyNm}, OPEN_MARKET_REFERER = #{openMarketReferer}, RECOMMEND_FLAG_CD = #{recommendFlagCd}, RECOMMEND_FLAG_NM = #{recommendFlagNm}, RECOMMEND_INFO = #{recommendInfo}, SHOP_CD = #{shopCd}, SHOP_NM = #{shopNm}, MINOR_AGENT_NAME = #{minorAgentName}, MINOR_AGENT_RELATION = #{minorAgentRelation}, MINOR_AGENT_REL_NM = #{minorAgentRelNm}, MINOR_AGENT_TEL = #{minorAgentTel}, APP_CD = #{appCd}, APP_NM = #{appNm}, JOIN_PAY_MTHD_CD = #{joinPayMthdCd}, JOIN_PAY_MTHD_NM = #{joinPayMthdNm}, JOIN_PRICE = #{joinPrice}, USIM_PAY_MTHD_CD = #{usimPayMthdCd}, USIM_PAY_MTHD_NM = #{usimPayMthdNm}, USIM_PRICE = #{usimPrice}, RENTAL_BASE_AMT = #{rentalBaseAmt}, RENTAL_BASE_DC_AMT = #{rentalBaseDcAmt}, RENTAL_MODEL_CP_AMT = #{rentalModelCpAmt}, CSTMR_TYPE = #{cstmrType}, REQ_PAY_TYPE = #{reqPayType}, REQUEST_STATE_CODE = #{requestStateCode}, SHOP_USM_ID = #{shopUsimId}, PROD_TYPE = #{prodType}, REQ_USIM_NAME = #{reqUsimName}, SIM_INFO = #{simInfo}, PROMOTION_CD = #{promotionCd}, REAL_SHOP_NM = #{realShopNm}, RVISN_DTTM = SYSDATE WHERE CONTRACT_NUM = #{contractNum}
mapper.select: SELECT REQ.REQUEST_KEY, CSTMR_NAME, DECODE(TRIM(CST.CSTMR_MOBILE_FN) || TRIM(CST.CSTMR_MOBILE_MN) || TRIM(CST.CSTMR_MOBILE_RN), '', TRIM(CST.CSTMR_TEL_FN) || TRIM(CST.CSTMR_TEL_MN) || TRIM(CST.CSTMR_TEL_RN), TRIM(CST.CSTMR_MOBILE_FN) || TRIM(CST.CSTMR_MOBILE_MN) || TRIM(CST.CSTMR_MOBILE_RN) ) AS CSTMR_MOBILE, SUBSTR(REPLACE(CRYPTO_AES256.DEC_AES(DECODE(REQ.CSTMR_TYPE, 'FN', TRIM(CST.CSTMR_FOREIGNER_RRN), TRIM(CST.CSTMR_NATIVE_RRN))), '-', ''), 0, 6) AS BIRTH_DT, SUBSTR(REPLACE(CRYPTO_AES256.DEC_AES(DECODE(REQ.CSTMR_TYPE, 'FN', TRIM(CST.CSTMR_FOREIGNER_RRN), TRIM(CST.CSTMR_NATIVE_RRN))), '-', ''), 7, 1) AS CSTMR_GENDER_STR, SAL.SOC_CODE, MOV.MOVE_COMPANY, (MOV.MOVE_MOBILE_FN) || TRIM(MOV.MOVE_MOBILE_MN) || TRIM(MOV.MOVE_MOBILE_RN) AS MOVE_MOBILE, SAL.MODEL_ID, SAL.SPRT_TP, CST.CSTMR_ADDR, CST.CSTMR_ADDR_DTL, TRIM(CST.CSTMR_TEL_FN) || TRIM(CST.CSTMR_TEL_MN) || TRIM(CST.CSTMR_TEL_RN) AS CSTMR_TEL, DLV.DLVRY_TYPE, DLV.DLVRY_ADDR, DLV.DLVRY_ADDR_DTL, DLV.DLVRY_POST, TRIM(DLV.DLVRY_MOBILE_FN) || TRIM(DLV.DLVRY_MOBILE_MN) || TRIM(DLV.DLVRY_MOBILE_RN) AS DLVRY_MOBILE, DLV.DLVRY_MEMO, CST.RECOMMEND_FLAG_CD, CST.RECOMMEND_INFO FROM MCP_REQUEST@DL_MCP REQ ,MCP_REQUEST_CSTMR@DL_MCP CST ,MCP_REQUEST_SALEINFO@DL_MCP SAL ,MCP_REQUEST_MOVE@DL_MCP MOV ,MCP_REQUEST_DLVRY@DL_MCP DLV WHERE 1 = 1 AND REQ.REQUEST_KEY = CST.REQUEST_KEY AND REQ.REQUEST_KEY = SAL.REQUEST_KEY AND REQ.REQUEST_KEY = MOV.REQUEST_KEY AND REQ.REQUEST_KEY = DLV.REQUEST_KEY AND REQ.REQUEST_KEY = #{requestKey}
